svg.title: FairSight system architecture diagram
svg.desc: Four-layer architecture: data ingestion, bias detection engine, reporting dashboard, and remediation layer, with flow between them.

g.text: CSV / JSON / Parquet upload · REST API · model artifacts (.pkl, .onnx, .joblib)

svg.text: React 18 + TypeScript · FastAPI · Python 3.11 · AIF360 / Fairlearn · PostgreSQL · Redis · Docker · Pytest
